{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320124615297EF3FC4BAD4E12AD31"}"},"total":2466},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7279824642221638415","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看的一部小说，作者想法丰富，知道超级好看的读者们爱看什么，深得民心！为了奖励作者，奖励一天三更[偷笑][偷笑][偷笑][偷笑][偷笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1694967484,"group_id":"7270734352873425961","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"社会人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7PPQ59uTcN01ioOovBVGGk=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fc85ef80c4174d7c9a10ce8f0ee4386b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530212&x-signature=bnKcc0hKVlMGKBvANKYB%2B643mUc%3D","user_id":"465806206179742","user_name":"怡路顺风"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"465806206179742","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7270734352873425961","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌流】【躺平不内卷】【搞笑无厘头】【无女主】【后宫党慎入】......
拥有遇强则强系统，即将寿终正寝的叶君临，开始修为无上限的开挂生涯。
仙帝？圣人？天道？通通都给我靠边站!
除此之外，他还收了好几个徒弟。
大徒弟是魔教教主，心狠手辣，脑后有反骨，但每次都被收拾的服服帖帖!
二徒弟是白毛小萝莉，身负诸天第一仙体，明明实力超强，却喜欢做美食，乖乖侍奉师尊!
三徒弟是凶名赫赫的刀魔，疯批人设，师尊让他砍谁他就砍谁!！
四徒弟是社恐的大蘑菇，修炼青帝长生诀，有青帝命格，却要时刻提防被师尊熬成蘑菇汤!
........
当整个宇宙进入至暗时刻，亿万万生灵期盼奇迹出现，叶君临吃饱喝足，从烧烤店慢条斯理的走出，淡淡道:"无所谓，我会出手。"","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/90291e3f64de4df5dbdc22ec1900d574","author":"史上最帅作者","author_id":"","book_id":"7270734352873425961","book_name":"玄幻：遇强则强，我的修为无上限","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7272809347439135744","read_count":"27852","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2071206"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"819","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,东方玄幻,系统,穿越,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/303ef96605c7fa5dbbab8ea6447af644~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779165975&x-signature=o6uyI898%2Bj2S7ej3zL9hHDETiDA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.2291245e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320124615297EF3FC4BAD4E12AD31"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat": unt":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":43387,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6884},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7534705507809739582","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"纯爽文，一路爽到尾，系统并没有出现自相矛盾违反题目的情况就是真正的敌强我更强（全方位都很强）支线较少，主线比较连贯，由于打斗频繁导致文章紧凑没有长草章的出现，当然这本小说本质上还是爽文如果遇到褶皱被抚平的情况也是正常的，挺好看的，如果有人抬杠那么你说的对，最后祝所有读者和作者大大天天开心[爱心][爱心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754315307,"group_id":"7270734352873425961","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1uc/xL5i27xA5CZ4GiOKN8f2l68EZFhsS/gL4c82bBB","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2151072041805229","user_name":"瓦酷瓦酷～"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2151072041805229","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7270734352873425961","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌流】【躺平不内卷】【搞笑无厘头】【无女主】【后宫党慎入】......
